class.name: studica_vmxpi_ros2/RobotSystemHardware
class.description: The ros2_control robot simulation example using a system hardware interface-type. It uses velocity command and position state interface.

class.name: studica_vmxpi_ros2/VmxSystemHardware
class.description: The ros2_control Titan example using a system hardware interface-type. It uses velocity command and position state interface.
